targets.query:
SELECT percentile("maxHR", 95)
FROM "ActivitySummary"
WHERE $timeFilter AND "activity_type_tag" =~ /${SportGroup:raw}/

SELECT max("maxHR")
FROM "ActivitySummary"
WHERE $timeFilter AND "activity_type_tag" =~ /${SportGroup:raw}/
SELECT last("HRmax_est") FROM "PhysiologyDaily" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("HRR") FROM "PhysiologyDaily" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("RHR_7d_median") FROM "PhysiologyDaily" WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT last("avgOvernightHrv")
FROM "SleepSummary"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT last("ATL_7_TSS")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("CTL_42_TSS")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("TSB_TSS")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("ATL_7_TRIMP")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("CTL_42_TRIMP")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("TSB_TRIMP")
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("best5m_vo2_last")
FROM "PerformanceDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT last("VO2max_est_run")
FROM "PerformanceDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT last("VO2_max_value")
FROM "VO2_Max"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT last("VO2_max_value_cycling")
FROM "VO2_Max"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT last("FitnessAge_model")
FROM "PerformanceDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT last("restingHeartRate")
FROM "DailyStats"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT moving_average(mean("restingHeartRate"), 28)
FROM "DailyStats"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT last("CTL_42_TRIMP") AS CTL, last("ATL_7_TRIMP") AS ATL, last("TSB_TRIMP") AS TSB
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT last("CTL_42_TSS") AS CTL, last("ATL_7_TSS") AS ATL, last("TSB_TSS") AS TSB
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT "CTL_42_TRIMP","ATL_7_TRIMP","TSB_TRIMP"
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT "CTL_42_TSS","ATL_7_TSS","TSB_TSS"
FROM "TrainingLoadDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND "Database_Name"='GarminStats'
  AND "Device"='fenix 8 - 51mm, AMOLED'

SELECT
  last("Z1_Low")  AS "HR Low",
  last("Z1_High") AS "HR High1"
FROM "PhysiologyDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT
  last("Z2_Low")  AS "HR Low",
  last("Z2_High") AS "HR High1"
FROM "PhysiologyDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT
  last("Z3_Low")  AS "HR Low",
  last("Z3_High") AS "HR High1"
FROM "PhysiologyDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT
  last("Z4_Low")  AS "HR Low",
  last("Z4_High") AS "HR High1"
FROM "PhysiologyDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT
  last("Z5_Low")  AS "HR Low",
  last("Z5_High") AS "HR High1"
FROM "PhysiologyDaily"
WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("restingHeartRate") FROM "DailyStats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("avgOvernightHrv") FROM "SleepSummary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("VO2_max_value") FROM "VO2_Max" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("maxHR") FROM "ActivitySummary" WHERE $timeFilter AND "activity_type_tag" =~ /${SportGroup:raw}/

SELECT last("VO2_max_value")
FROM "VO2_Max"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT last("VO2_max_value_cycling")
FROM "VO2_Max"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT mean("restingHeartRate")
FROM "DailyStats"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

SELECT mean("avgOvernightHrv")
FROM "SleepSummary"
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

list.name: SportGroup
list.query: Running : running|trail_running|treadmill_running|ultra_run, Cycling : road_biking|gravel_cycling|mountain_biking|cyclocross|virtual_ride|indoor_cycling, Inline skating : inline_skating, Strength : strength_training, Indoor cardio : indoor_cardio
